data.text: I’ve confirmed the CLI and server paths already have the hook objects constructed in some places, so the remaining gap is likely the runtime object or the dispatch path for MinPower. I’m checking the shared agent dispatch seam and the work/server call sites before touching code.

data.text: The tree already contains dedicated intake-hook tests, so I’m verifying whether they currently assert the strong-power floor and passthrough behavior the bead requires, or whether the missing part is inside the hook itself. That will determine whether this is a small wiring fix or a deeper policy change.

I’m at the verification stage now. The code appears to already contain the required hook wiring and strong-power intake path, so I’m running the exact bead tests plus pre-commit to prove whether there’s anything left to change.
